Motion To Compel Artbitration
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
LOURDES M. RADVILA, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)386-4134, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THERE WAS NO ARGUMENT. TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT LOURDES RADVILA'S Motion To Compel Arbitration IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION IS PREMISED ON DEFENDANT HAVING WAIVED ARBITRATION BY FILING AN ANSWER AND ON DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO FILE A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. THERE IS NO WAIVER AND THE COURT WILL TREAT THE MOTION AS INCLUDING A MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB/AL)
